delta-manager.description: Marketing, sales, and growth strategy specialist manager. Handles GTM strategy, content marketing, brand positioning, pricing strategy, and customer acquisition.

epsilon-manager.description: Product and UX design specialist manager. Handles user research, wireframes, user flows, design systems, and product specifications.

zeta-manager.description: Infrastructure and DevOps specialist manager. Handles service deployment, health monitoring, log analysis, and infrastructure automation. Manages infrastructure-1 through infrastructure-4 agents.

eta-manager.description: Legal compliance and regulatory specialist manager. Handles legal ethics, bar compliance, data privacy, and regulatory requirements for legal tech products.
